mapper.insert: INSERT INTO "conversation_sharing" ( "creator_id", "modifier_id", "parent_conversation_id", "shared_conversation_id", "end_round_number", "accessible_after_deleted", "expires_at", "revoked", "revoked_at" ) VALUES ( #{creatorId}, #{modifierId}, #{parentConversationId}, #{sharedConversationId}, #{endRoundNumber}, FALSE, #{expiresAt}, FALSE, NULL )
mapper.select: SELECT FROM "conversation_sharing" WHERE "shared_conversation_id" = #{sharedConversationId} AND "revoked" = FALSE AND ("expires_at" IS NULL OR "expires_at" > NOW())

SELECT sharing."parent_conversation_id" AS "parentConversationId", sharing."shared_conversation_id" AS "sharedConversationId", CASE WHEN conversation."deleted" = FALSE THEN conversation."title" ELSE NULL END AS "title", sharing."creation_time" AS "creationTime", sharing."end_round_number" AS "endRoundNumber", sharing."expires_at" AS "expiresAt", sharing."revoked" AS "revoked", sharing."revoked_at" AS "revokedAt" FROM "conversation_sharing" sharing LEFT JOIN "conversation" conversation ON conversation."conversation_id" = sharing."parent_conversation_id" WHERE sharing."creator_id" = #{userId} ORDER BY sharing."creation_time" DESC
